html:
“Raises sanity while cooling the wearer.”

-

The Chilled Amulet is a craftable Item found in the Magic Filter and Summer Items Filter. It requires a Prestihatitator to prototype and costs 3 Gold Nuggets and 1 Blue Gem to craft. It also can randomly drop from an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when the latter is damaged with a Hammer, Gunpowder etc. It can be equipped in the chest slot and lasts for 6 minutes (3/4th of an in-game day). While a player has the Chilled Amulet equipped, they will gain +2 per minute.

This comes with temperature loss, which can cause Freezing. Anything that attacks the player wearing the Chilled Amulet will be slowed down and then frozen if attacks are repeated, similar to how the Ice Staff needs several hits to freeze certain mobs. Each hit the player receives while wearing the Chilled Amulet (no matter the damage dealt) costs the Amulet 3% of its durability. Wearing a Chilled Amulet will protect players from Overheating. Even standing directly next to a blazing Campfire in the heat of Summer will not overcome the amulet's cooling ability.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Reliquary Collection
Sepulchral Amulet
Sometimes you gotta lose it, to find it.

Tips

  • As the amulet only lasts for 6 minutes, using it solely to regain only 12 total Sanity is inadvisable.
  • The Chilled Amulet requires more hits from mobs to freeze them than the Ice Staff needs (e.g. 12 hits for the Dragonfly, 7 more than the Ice Staff). So when the players just want to freeze mobs it is advised to use an Ice Staff instead.
  • The Chilled Amulet provides no protection against any Fire damage.
  • Since the amulet can only be worn for 6 minutes, its best use is early in the game during the middle of Summers. At that point standing under a Tree won't cool down the player enough to lower their temperature below the Overheating threshold, but equipping the Chilled Amulet will. After the Amulet has cooled players below the Overheating threshold, they can then equip clothes meant to delay Overheating (e.g. Floral Shirt) to save its durability.
    • Later on it is advised to use Blue Gems to turn Chester into Snow Chester instead, and hot-swap Thermal Stones with it to keep cool at no additional cost.
    • When equipping the Chilled Amulet, players should unequip any other items that delay or prevent Overheating to save their durability since the effects don't stack.

Trivia

  • The Chilled Amulet shares the same in-game model with the Lazy Forager but its gem is blue instead of orange.

Assets

Chilled AmuletSepulchral Amulet

"blueamulet"
“Cool as ice!”
–Wilson
“Boo to this.”
–Willow
“Would make good ice cube!”
–Wolfgang
“A familiar, chilling embrace.”
–Wendy
“THIS WILL MAKE A GREAT HEATSINK”
–WX-78
“The gem appears to be sucking energy out anything it touches.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just need a tasty beverage to cool now, eh?”
–Woodie
“It's frosted over.”
–Maxwell
“Cöld jewelery.”
–Wigfrid
“I guess it's nice.”
–Webber
“Brrrrrr!”
–Warly
“Cold Neck Thing”
–Wormwood
“Now I don't have to take breaks to cool off.”
–Winona
“The cold won't get through my chest tuft, hyuyu.”
–Wortox
“Chilly!”
–Wurt
“Brr... how does it stay so cold?”
–Walter
“Just looking at it chills me to the bone.”
–Wanda
“Raises sanity while cooling the wearer.”
-
The Chilled Amulet is a craftable Item found in the Magic Filter and Summer Items Filter. It requires a Prestihatitator to prototype and costs 3 Gold Nuggets and 1 Blue Gem to craft. It also can randomly drop from an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when the latter is damaged with a Hammer, Gunpowder etc. It can be equipped in the chest slot and lasts for 6 minutes (3/4th of an in-game day). While a player has the Chilled Amulet equipped, they will gain +2 per minute.
This comes with temperature loss, which can cause Freezing. Anything that attacks the player wearing the Chilled Amulet will be slowed down and then frozen if attacks are repeated, similar to how the Ice Staff needs several hits to freeze certain mobs. Each hit the player receives while wearing the Chilled Amulet (no matter the damage dealt) costs the Amulet 3% of its durability.
Wearing a Chilled Amulet will protect players from Overheating. Even standing directly next to a blazing Campfire in the heat of Summer will not overcome the amulet's cooling ability.

Freezes attackers when hit. |objectSanity= +2/min |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "blueamulet" |description = What a cool amulet. |haunt = 25% chance to [[Ice_Staff/DST#Freezing_Effect|chill]] nearby mobs by 0.67 }} {{Quotes |wilson = Cool as ice! |willow = Boo to this. |wolfgang = Would make good ice cube! |wendy = A familiar, chilling embrace. |wx78 = THIS WILL MAKE A GREAT HEATSINK |wickerbottom = The gem appears to be sucking energy out anything it touches. |woodie = Just need a tasty beverage to cool now, eh? |maxwell = It's frosted over. |wigfrid = Cöld jewelery. |webber = I guess it's nice. |winona = Now I don't have to take breaks to cool off. |warly = Brrrrrr! |wortox = The cold won't get through my chest tuft, hyuyu. |wormwood = Cold Neck Thing |wurt = Chilly! |walter = Brr... how does it stay so cold? |wanda = Just looking at it chills me to the bone. |choose = wickerbottom }} {{Scrapbook_Info|Raises sanity while cooling the wearer.}} The '''Chilled Amulet''' is a craftable [[Item]] found in the [[Magic Filter]] and [[Summer Items Filter]]. It requires a [[Prestihatitator]] to prototype and costs 3 [[Gold Nuggets]] and 1 [[Blue Gem]] to craft. It also can randomly drop from an [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] when the latter is damaged with a [[Hammer]], [[Gunpowder]] etc. It can be equipped in the chest slot and lasts for 6 minutes (3/4th of an in-game [[day]]). While a player has the Chilled Amulet equipped, they will gain +2 {{sanity}} per minute. This comes with temperature loss, which can cause [[Freezing]]. Anything that attacks the player wearing the Chilled Amulet will be slowed down and then frozen if attacks are repeated, similar to how the [[Ice Staff]] needs several hits to freeze certain [[mobs]]. Each hit the player receives while wearing the Chilled Amulet (no matter the damage dealt) costs the Amulet 3% of its durability. Wearing a Chilled Amulet will protect players from [[Overheating]]. Even standing directly next to a blazing [[Campfire]] in the heat of [[Summer#Reign of Giants|Summer]] will not overcome the amulet's cooling ability. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Amulets|Belongings}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * As the amulet only lasts for 6 minutes, using it solely to regain only 12 total [[Sanity]] is inadvisable. * The Chilled Amulet requires more hits from mobs to freeze them than the Ice Staff needs (e.g. 12 hits for the [[Dragonfly]], 7 more than the Ice Staff). So when the players just want to freeze mobs it is advised to use an Ice Staff instead. * The Chilled Amulet provides no protection against any [[Fire]] damage. * Since the amulet can only be worn for 6 minutes, its best use is early in the game during the middle of Summers. At that point standing under a [[:Category:Trees|Tree]] won't cool down the player enough to lower their temperature below the Overheating threshold, but equipping the Chilled Amulet will. After the Amulet has cooled players below the Overheating threshold, they can then equip clothes meant to delay Overheating (e.g. [[Floral Shirt]]) to save its durability. ** Later on it is advised to use Blue Gems to turn [[Chester]] into Snow Chester instead, and hot-swap [[Thermal Stone]]s with it to keep cool at no additional cost. ** When equipping the Chilled Amulet, players should unequip any other items that delay or prevent Overheating to save their durability since the effects don't stack. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Chilled Amulet shares the same in-game model with the [[The Lazy Forager|Lazy Forager]] but its gem is blue instead of [[Orange Gem|orange]]. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Chilled Amulet= Chilled Amulet Dropped.png|Dropped Chilled Amulet Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Sepulchral Amulet= Sepulchral Amulet Dropped.png|Dropped Sepulchral Amulet Equipped.png|Equipped == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Chilled Amulet Wilson.png|[[Wilson]] wearing a Chilled Amulet.
